entry.title: [Podfic] What a Fine Mess
entry.summary:
Author: Rambling_Company

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Authors Summary: Dick Grayson has seen a lot of things, over the years. But if someone had told him a fairly routine night would have ended with him finding his own clone in the form of a young Talon- well, he would have called them crazy. And if they told him he would take the kid home- he would have locked them up for a stint in Arkham. But as wild as it was- well, his life had always been crazy.

entry.title: don't let your heart run away
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,208Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 29

Summary: It all started with this stupid incorrect quotes collection featuring the members of the Robins on Wattpad that Steph sent the group chat the link to. Surely, no one would blame him for eventually getting curious, right? Wattpad is technically an app for all types of stories, but it's also widely known for its huge amount of fanfiction. Of course, Dick looks up his name first.

entry.title: With My Heart on a Trigger
entry.summary:
Author: TrivialCrow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,101Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 139

Summary: Years after a disastrous mission shattered their bodies and their bond, bodyguard Jason Todd is forced to protect the one man he can't forget: Dick Grayson. As old threats resurface, they must confront the lies and hurt that drove them apart. But the truth of what happened three years ago might be more dangerous than the enemies hunting them, and healing old wounds could cost them everything they have left.

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,232Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

entry.title: You are precious to me.
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_dreamy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 169,245Chapters: 63/?Kudos: 373

Summary: Damian had been sexually assaulted and after that his father saw the video, he just want to run away. That is how he end up living with Dick. Dick is conflicated about his feelings for Jason. Damian is now under his care and him and Bruce are still awkward around each other. And something is up with Tim but he doesn't know what. Jason is waiting for Dick to give him a proper answer. His hate for Bruce is too strong and he do not feel welcome in their perfect little family. or Everyone is dealing with things and their family is slowly falling appart. Would they succeed to all get along and get over the mistakes of the past?

entry.title: Tired Stars
entry.summary:
Author: ResidentJazz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,722Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 459

Summary: Dick Grayson has always known how to smile on command, how to play the part people expect — even when it tears him apart. After a public breakdown and a mission that pushes him past his limits, Bruce’s disappointment feels like another verdict he can’t escape. But Jason refuses to let him spiral alone.In the quiet of a safe house, between coffee that tastes like ash, late-night movies, and the weight of a case too close to home, Dick has to confront the question he’s never dared to ask: who is he when he isn’t what Bruce made him?One step at a time, he’ll have to find out.

entry.summary:
Author: elwon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,000Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 104

Summary: “Don’t look.” Jason mutters to himself as he steps out onto the casino floor.He repeats it, over and over in his head, as he grows closer to the place he shouldn’t look at. Namely, the roulette table that his newest hire is currently working. Dick Grisfils, or, as Jason likes to call him; his next worst mistake that he needs to avoid making.

entry.title: JOYRIDE
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,360Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: When Dick heard the door of their apartment complex open, a whirlwind of emotions hit him square in the stomach."I'm home!" Jason's voice echoed through the walls of the flat.Fuck.Dick panicked, almost forgetting where he was and what he was wearing as Jason's footsteps grew closer and closer. It was far too late when the connection brain-to-mouth finally caught on, because it was just as Jason opened the door to their bedroom that Dick squealed, "Don't look!"And, obviously, when Dick shouted not to look, Jason's first reaction was to look.

entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,505Chapters: 2/7Kudos: 45

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.
